entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp., a legume crop important for small-holder farming in southern Africa

entities.name: SOUTHERN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region where pigeonpea production is being enhanced

entities.name: SENSITIVITY TO PHOTOPERIOD
entities.description: A biological trait that leads to delayed flowering and maturity in pigeonpea

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT
entities.description: An abiotic stress condition occurring at the end of the growing season that reduces crop yields

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the crop, measured in t/ha

entities.name: DURATION TO FLOWERING
entities.description: The time taken for the plant to reach the flowering stage

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the plant to reach full physiological maturity

entities.name: LOW WINTER TEMPERATURES
entities.description: An abiotic condition that negatively impacts delayed maturing crops

entities.name: FROST
entities.description: An abiotic condition that negatively impacts delayed maturing crops

entities.name: DOMESTIC LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Free-ranging animals that interfere with crop production

entities.name: CROSSING COMBINATIONS
entities.description: A breeding method used to create segregating populations from parental genotypes

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL MARKERS
entities.description: Physical traits used to identify and select elite cultivars

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PERFORMANCE INDICATORS
entities.description: Metrics used to evaluate the performance of crop cultivars

entities.name: FIELD EVALUATION
entities.description: The process of testing cultivars in a representative location over multiple seasons

entities.name: ELITE CULTIVARS
entities.description: High-performing pigeonpea varieties with enhanced flowering, maturity, and yield
